title: Front Office Manager - IndiGo - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - IndiGo - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, IndiGo in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About IndiGo:
IndiGo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
